blurb: The selection-review deck where drafted candidate cards stack in 3D and advance one at a time on Pass / Approve.

components.name: Selection deck
components.blurb: The .nx selection-review module: a framed stage where candidate cards stack in perspective, with Pass / Approve controls that fly the front card off and slide the next forward; the JS builds and renders all cards into #nxStage.
components.html:
Selection grid engaged
